Subject: Formal Complaint Regarding Fraudulent Delivery and Misuse of OTP ​Dear Amazon Support/Grievance Team, ​I am writing to formally report a fraudulent incident regarding my recent order. On June 15, 2026, I received a call from a delivery person. As I had already purchased the item from elsewhere, I requested him to take it back. ​The delivery person convinced me to share an OTP, falsely claiming that it was required to cancel the order and process the return. Never buy on Amazon. Idk who is responsible but its just too wrong with my recent purchase. First they sended 2 repeated rings instead of 4 distinct ones then i wanted an exchange, now they gave only 2 rings. I asked for return 2 times in just 1 week now and they all refused to take it back saying "there's not 4 rings", how the hell am i supposed to give back the 4 rings i never got. Both of them didn't take it back while i have posted the refund under 'missing part' section only!

Worst Delivery Service – 4 Cancellations! Absolute waste of time. I ordered an urgent book for my studies and Amazon made me wait a week just to cancel it. They blocked my money and made me wait 5 days for a refund. They cancelled my orders 4 separate times just because their facility is 35 km away! If you can't deliver, don't take the order. I finally went to an offline store to buy it. Even Meesho delivers to my address perfectly, but Amazon completely failed. Avoid buying urgent items here!
